data_description.name: Used for the device name and the '{name}' filename placeholder.
data_description.output_dir: Where finished videos are saved. Leave empty to use the media folder (visible in the Media Browser, including NAS network storage mounts). Custom paths must be in allowlist_external_dirs or a media dir.
data_description.keep_frames: Keep the individual snapshot frames on disk after the video is rendered.
data_description.schedule_enabled: Capture every day between the start and end times; the video is rendered when the window ends. Overnight windows (e.g. 22:00 to 06:00) are supported.
data_description.watch_entity: Optional entity to watch: capture starts when it turns on and stops (and renders) when it turns off.

error.path_not_allowed: This path is not absolute or not allowed. Add it to allowlist_external_dirs or use a media folder.
error.schedule_times_required: Set both a start and an end time when the schedule is enabled.
error.schedule_start_equals_end: Start and end time must be different.

data_description.output_dir: Where finished videos are saved. Leave empty to use the media folder (visible in the Media Browser, including NAS network storage mounts). Custom paths must be in allowlist_external_dirs or a media dir.
data_description.keep_frames: Keep the individual snapshot frames on disk after the video is rendered.
data_description.schedule_enabled: Capture every day between the start and end times; the video is rendered when the window ends. Overnight windows (e.g. 22:00 to 06:00) are supported.
data_description.watch_entity: Optional entity to watch: capture starts when it turns on and stops (and renders) when it turns off.

error.path_not_allowed: This path is not absolute or not allowed. Add it to allowlist_external_dirs or use a media folder.
error.schedule_times_required: Set both a start and an end time when the schedule is enabled.
error.schedule_start_equals_end: Start and end time must be different.

start.name: Start capture
start.description: Starts a timelapse capture session for a profile.

stop.name: Stop capture
stop.description: Stops the capture session and renders the timelapse video.

render.name: Render video
render.description: Render the video after stopping. If disabled, frames are discarded unless 'keep frames' is enabled.

render.name: Render again
render.description: Renders the most recent retained frame set again (kept frames or a failed render).

cancel.name: Cancel capture
cancel.description: Aborts the capture session and discards its frames without rendering.

entry_not_found.message: No Auto Time Lapse profile found with config entry id {entry_id}.

entry_not_loaded.message: Auto Time Lapse profile {title} is not loaded.

no_frames.message: There are no retained frames to render. Capture a session first, or enable 'keep frames'.
